advancedSettings.title: Local Data Settings
advancedSettings.subtitle: Data export, integrations, cache
advancedSettings.exportConfirmationSubtitle: Optionally protect the file with a phrase. Leave blank for no encryption.
advancedSettings.importConfirmationSubtitle: If the backup was encrypted, enter the same phrase used when exporting.
advancedSettings.decryptionPhrasePlaceholder: Enter phrase if backup was encrypted
advancedSettings.exportFailedMessage: An error occurred while exporting. Please try again.
advancedSettings.importFailedMessage: An error occurred while importing. Please check the file and try again.
advancedSettings.anonymousBugReportSubtitle: Help improve Musclog by sending crash logs
advancedSettings.chartTooltipLeftSubtitle: Show chart data tooltips on the top-left instead of top-right
advancedSettings.manageFoodDataSubtitle: View, edit, or delete your custom food entries
advancedSettings.manageNutritionLogsDataSubtitle: Review and modify your daily nutrition records
advancedSettings.manageMealsDataSubtitle: Organize and adjust your saved meal configurations
advancedSettings.managePortionsDataSubtitle: Handle custom portion sizes for various foods
advancedSettings.manageWorkoutsDataSubtitle: Edit or remove your personalized workout routines
advancedSettings.manageWorkoutsLogDataSubtitle: Access and modify your past workout sessions
advancedSettings.manageMetricsDataSubtitle: Track and adjust your body metrics and progress
advancedSettings.manageExercisesDataSubtitle: Maintain your custom exercise list and details
advancedSettings.manageGoalsDataSubtitle: View and manage your nutrition and body composition goals history
advancedSettings.manageCheckinsDataSubtitle: View and manage your progress check-ins
advancedSettings.clearAppDataSubtitle: Open Android settings to clear cache and data
advancedSettings.openSettingsFailedMessage: Unable to open app settings. Please open them manually.

aiSettings.useOcrBeforeAiSubtitle: Process images locally with OCR and send text instead
aiSettings.sendFoundationFoodsToLlmSubtitle: Improve ingredient matching using the foundation foods database

aiSettings.customPromptsSubtitle: Add your own instructions to all AI features
aiSettings.deletePromptConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this prompt?
aiSettings.maxAiMemoriesSubtitle: Number of previous messages to remember in conversations
